option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package org.springframework.ai.chat.client;
// Local stub removed: rely on the real Spring AI dependency.

option.name: filePath

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /application (snapshot).yaml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
spring: application: name: llm-service config: import: "optional:configserver:http://localhost:8888" # Config Server adresin ai: ollama: base-url: "http://ollama:11434" chat: options: model: "llama3.2:1b" temperature: 0.0 top_p: 0.1 # Keep responses short to reduce latency/CPU. num_predict: 128 num_ctx: 1024 embedding: options: model: nomic-embed-text vector: store: path: "data/vector-store.json" datasource: url: ${CLUB_DB_URL:jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/postgres?currentSchema=club_db} username: ${CLUB_DB_USER:eduadmin} password: ${CLUB_DB_PASSWORD:edu123} driver-class-name: org.postgresql.Driver
club: ingestion: enabled: true force: false
# Local logging overrides. Config server can still override these values. logging: level: # Keep framework logs at INFO by default, enable DEBUG for service package root: INFO org.springframework: INFO com.educonnect.llmservice: DEBUG

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring: application: name: llm-service config: import: "optional:configserver:http://localhost:8888" # Config Server adresin ai: ollama: base-url: "http://ollama:11434" chat: options: model: "llama3.2:1b" temperature: 0.0 top_p: 0.1 # Keep responses short to reduce latency/CPU. num_predict: 128 num_ctx: 1024 embedding: options: model: nomic-embed-text vector: store: path: "data/vector-store.json" datasource: url: ${CLUB_DB_URL:jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/postgres?currentSchema=club_db} username: ${CLUB_DB_USER:eduadmin} password: ${CLUB_DB_PASSWORD:edu123} driver-class-name: org.postgresql.Driver
club: ingestion: enabled: true force: true
# Local logging overrides. Config server can still override these values. logging: level: # Keep framework logs at INFO by default, enable DEBUG for service package root: INFO org.springframework: INFO com.educonnect.llmservice: DEBUG

option.name: filePath
option.value: /pom (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.educonnect</groupId> <artifactId>educonnect-parent</artifactId> <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version> </parent>
<artifactId>llm-service</artifactId> <name>llm-service</name> <description>EduConnect LLM and AI Agent Service</description>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-openfeign</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId> <artifactId>spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>${spring-ai.version}</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId> <artifactId>spring-ai-pdf-document-reader</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Semantic Caching for Vectors --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId> <artifactId>spring-ai-redis-store-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>${spring-ai.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Reactive Programming --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webflux</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Netty DNS Resolver for macOS (Removes the UnsatisfiedLinkError) --> <dependency> <groupId>io.netty</groupId> <artifactId>netty-resolver-dns-native-macos</artifactId> <version>4.1.109.Final</version> <classifier>osx-aarch64</classifier> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-amqp</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-jdbc</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <excludes> <exclude>**/org/springframework/ai/chat/client/**</exclude> </excludes> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <excludes> <exclude> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </exclude> </excludes> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.educonnect</groupId> <artifactId>educonnect-parent</artifactId> <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version> </parent>
<artifactId>llm-service</artifactId> <name>llm-service</name> <description>EduConnect LLM and AI Agent Service</description>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-openfeign</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId> <artifactId>spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>${spring-ai.version}</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId> <artifactId>spring-ai-pdf-document-reader</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Semantic Caching for Vectors --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId> <artifactId>spring-ai-redis-store-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>${spring-ai.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Reactive Programming --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webflux</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Netty DNS Resolver for macOS (Removes the UnsatisfiedLinkError) --> <dependency> <groupId>io.netty</groupId> <artifactId>netty-resolver-dns-native-macos</artifactId> <classifier>osx-aarch64</classifier> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-amqp</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-jdbc</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <excludes> <exclude>**/org/springframework/ai/chat/client/**</exclude> </excludes> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <excludes> <exclude> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </exclude> </excludes> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>
